meaning: n.[电子]光电倍增器,光电倍增管(亦作photomultiplier tube)
examples: A circuit for taking out timing signal from one dynode of photomultiplier is described.
A high voltage gating switch of variable delay for photomultiplier tube has been fabricated.
A new cylindrical light guide coupling the photomultiplier to a thin scintillator is described.
The heavy water is held in an acrylic sphere, and is surrounded by a network of nearly 10, 000 photomultiplier tubes.
